title: Totem NoRender
description: Stops the annoying totem pop animation from rendering
body:
## What is this mod?

This mod is very simple, all it does is remove the totem pop animation from rendering so you don't have your vision obstructed while playing some Crystal PvP.

## Do I need any other mods for this one?

You also don't need any other mods to use this one! Due to its simplicity, it doesn't require any other mod to work. Simply download a JAR file, drag it from your downloads folder into your mods folder, run the game and it should work.

## I want to contribute, how can I do so?

Due to the mod's simplicity, there's not much to contribute. The mod will load on a ton versions, ranging from 1.14 to 1.20.1. However, I have not tested the mod on all of these versions. Currently, the mod is only tested and works as intended in versions 1.19 to 1.19.4. If you want to help me, you can join my discord server and just download the JAR on different versions and tell me on the discord server if the mod works as intended on those versions without any errors. I appreciate any help I can get.
